reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio tradicional en Belgrano, en realidad es el centro servicial Nro 60 del Automóvil club Argentino. La estación está muy bien puesta y equipada, y ofrece amplia variedad de servicios afines. Muy buena la atención, se complica un poco el movimiento vehicular los días que aplican descuentos,  dado que su zona de ingreso para carga está sobre avenida Cabildo. Expenden combustibles y lubricantes de la marca.

(Translated by Google)
A traditional gas station in Belgrano is actually the Automóvil Club Argentino's Service Center No. 60. The station is very well-maintained and equipped, offering a wide variety of related services. The service is excellent, although traffic can be a bit congested on discount days, as the fueling entrance is located on Avenida Cabildo. They sell brand-name fuels and lubricants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWaTlTWHFBRRAB

I'm an ACA member and I felt like I'd arrived at the worst possible place in a neglected neighborhood.⁸
